text:
Created attachment 192118
Update cacti to 1.1.37

Update cacti to 1.1.37
This is a bugfix release, no need to merge quarterly.

committer: please ignore portlint warnings regarding gettext, cacti has internal gettext support so the warnings can be ignored.

Poudriere testport logs for 10.4/11.1 i386/amd64 at:

https://poudriere.dan.tm/poudriere/data/latest-per-pkg/cacti/1.1.37/
